name: Clay Asset Overhaul

assets.purpose: Primary Workshop composition, lighting, material, and silhouette target.
Bot body, skill attachment, pigment, favicon, toolbar, and context icon reference.
Generated workbench wall, light, shelf, table, and clay grain background.
Generated left launcher clay rail texture.
Generated right-side pressed clay tray texture.
Generated launcher button states: default, hover, pressed, disabled.
Generated raised and pressed clay panel surfaces.

notes: The desktop app mirrors these files into apps/desktop/public/assets/bots/0.3 for Vite runtime loading.
Generated clay UI assets are created by assets/bots/0.3/scripts/generate-clay-ui-assets.mjs.
The generated icon path remains deterministic from BotIdentity, with these references defining the clay material target.
Placeholder CSS bot pieces remain available as fallback when raster assets are unavailable.
